programme.title: Tales From Zambia
programme.desc: Life and Death on the Plains: The Liuwa Plains are one of Africa's last wild places - vast and remote grasslands where only the continent's toughest wildlife can survive. (S1, ep 3)

programme.title: Caught In Motion
programme.desc: New & Exclusive. Terra Firrma: Witness a cheetah chase wildebeest across the savannah, a chameleon launch its elastic tongue and more. (S1, ep 2)

programme.title: Jaguar Journals
programme.desc: Collar Complications: Rejoin the team for some post-rainy-season drama as they search for Ferinha, Fera and Badalo, whose tracking collars are missing. (S1, ep 3)

programme.title: Hope For Wildlife
programme.desc: Axis Mundi: A handful of weasels are finally ready for release into the wild, a daring volunteer goes offshore to rescue an injured eagle and a gull flies free. (S7, ep 9)

programme.title: Into The Big Blue Heart
programme.desc: The Subtropical Zone: Embark on an incredible journey into our planet's oceans, and discover how our seas sustain not only the life within them, but all life on earth. (S1, ep 2)

programme.title: Wild Workers
programme.desc: New & Exclusive. Exterminators: Discover how nature's pest controllers keep on top of bothersome bugs, beetles and beasts and help restore balance in the natural world. (S1, ep 5)

programme.title: Wild Workers
programme.desc: New & Exclusive. Butchers: Get to know nature's biggest carnivores. Follow this eclectic group of creatures as they hunt and even disembowel their victims... (S1, ep 6)

programme.desc: The great woolly monkey move around continues. Now that the bachelor group has been set up, Ayla is moved to the Pond Woollies and meets new alpha male Enzo. (S13, ep 15)

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Chimpanzee Kalu's health is giving cause for concern, as she's moved onto daily insulin injections to tackle her diabetes. (S13, ep 16)

programme.desc: Cat Out of the Bag: Hope tries to make two orphaned bobcats into playmates - with mixed results, 100 patients are ready for release and a rare bird makes a brief visit. (S7, ep 11)

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: As rivalry heats up on the King Crab grounds, Jake's next move pits him against Capt. Sig. Wild Bill battles rough seas and side effects, while Sophia "Bob" Nielsen tries to fix a deckhand's dislocated hip to avoid a steam back to town.

programme.title: Sin City Tow
programme.desc: Tow truck drivers look for illegally parked vehicles in Las Vegas. A driver gambles and accepts payment in casino chips. An urgent tow is required at a drive-through wedding chapel. A huge rig tow results in a heated confrontation. A tow truck driver has been attacked.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Captain Wild Bill heads to Russia as captain-for-hire. As an Opilio biomass concentrates along the Russian line, the Dutch Harbor fleet must prepare for a winter season far to the north where ice and waves are most severe and rescue is out of range.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Exploring some of the most brutal injuries and death-defying moments in crab-fishing history.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: As rivalry heats up on the King Crab grounds, Jake's next move pits him against Capt. Sig. Wild Bill battles rough seas and side effects, while Sophia "Bob" Nielsen tries to fix a deckhand's dislocated hip to avoid a steam back to town.

programme.title: Sin City Tow
programme.desc: Tow truck drivers look for illegally parked vehicles in Las Vegas. A driver gambles and accepts payment in casino chips. An urgent tow is required at a drive-through wedding chapel. A huge rig tow results in a heated confrontation. A tow truck driver has been attacked.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Captain Wild Bill heads to Russia as captain-for-hire. As an Opilio biomass concentrates along the Russian line, the Dutch Harbor fleet must prepare for a winter season far to the north where ice and waves are most severe and rescue is out of range.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Exploring some of the most brutal injuries and death-defying moments in crab-fishing history.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Farmtruck & AZN Down Under
programme.desc: Farmtruck and AZN travel to Australia in the hopes of catching some big-mouthed Australians; their first stop is Perth, where the boys get a taste of what Australia is all about.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Farmtruck & AZN Down Under
programme.desc: A nitrous shortage threatens to stall Farmtruck and AZN's Australian fishing trip.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Phil and Jess venture into the wilderness to investigate terrifying sightings of feral people prowling Appalachia's Great Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Jess and Phil venture deep into the Ozarks to investigate a mysterious predatory beast. Eyewitnesses, surveillance footage and new recordings of bone-chilling howls lead the team to a shocking revelation about the legendary creature.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Japan's 2011 Fukushima nuclear disaster, citizens began reporting something truly amazing: UFOs. Phil and Jess enter a radioactive wasteland to discover the stunning truth behind these "extraterrestrial" encounters.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh uncovers the mystery of Jean Laffite and the location of his hidden treasure.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.sub-title: The Hunt for the Golden Owl
programme.desc: Josh Gates stalks prey that has eluded capture for 25 years, the Golden Owl. A book of riddles gives cryptic clues to where the Owl statuette, worth half a million dollars, is hidden. Josh joins treasure hunters using new leads to chase the fortune.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh travels to his ancestral home of Great Britain to explore the origins of Stonehenge, finding an unexpected network of monuments that could have inspired its mystical location.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh Gates searches for the lost fortune of a notorious Montana sheriff in the Season 3 premiere. His hunt takes him to hidden cave systems; and he even blows open a mine that has been sealed for more than a century.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels through Peru, searching for the legendary Inca lost city of Paititi. His journey takes him from the historic Cusco, to the heights of Machu Picchu, and finally into the dark jungles of the Amazon.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: The hunt for the Amber Chamber takes Josh from Russia to Germany as he retraces the steps of Nazi soldiers, exploring abandoned bunkers and a hazardous mine in hopes of finding this most valuable treasure.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. Josh journeys through the land of the Nile to uncover the secrets of the most powerful, and most elusive, women in ancient Egypt: Hatshepsut, Nefertiti and Cleopatra.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Josh continues his journey through Egypt to uncover the secrets, and possibly the final resting place, of ancient history's most powerful women rulers: Nefertiti and Cleopatra.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Pushing into remote jungles, Josh investigates one of the 20th century's biggest heists – looting of Cambodian statues worth hundreds of millions. Chasing new leads, Josh rappels into a crumbling pyramid and digs up a treasure trove of missing monuments.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: A clandestine meeting with a Cambodian looter puts Josh on the trail of multi-million-dollar stolen monuments. Thanks to the looter's intel, Josh dives into a murky moat where he unearths a priceless lost statue and a missing piece of a national treasure.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to the Kingdom of Kush to dive the flooded pyramid tomb of a king. The murky water provides zero visibility, and the pyramid is at risk of collapse -- but the dive could unlock the mystery of a civilization that once conquered Egypt.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh Gates ventures into the flooded pyramid tomb of a Kush king. Scaling mountains to unravel the secrets of the Kingdom of Kush's conquest of Egypt, he dives into murky waters in search of the mummified remains of the king.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh chases archaeology's biggest prize: the lost tomb and treasure of Alexander the Great. Josh tunnels under modern Alexandria, but a water pump malfunction puts everything at risk.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: Fact or Fiction
programme.desc: Following the death of his father, a farmer believes he saw a UFO. A geologist discovered debris at the Roswell crash site. After sighting an orb in the sky, a mother develops radiation-like burns on her skin.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.sub-title: The Lost Tomb of Attila the Hun
programme.desc: Josh encounters three separate archaeological teams looking for the lost tomb of Attila the Hun in Hungary. Using legends and ancient texts as a guide, Josh's search takes him from the bottom of the Danube to the mountain forests outside of Budapest.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh Gates ventures into the flooded pyramid tomb of a Kush king. Scaling mountains to unravel the secrets of the Kingdom of Kush's conquest of Egypt, he dives into murky waters in search of the mummified remains of the king.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh chases archaeology's biggest prize: the lost tomb and treasure of Alexander the Great. Josh tunnels under modern Alexandria, but a water pump malfunction puts everything at risk.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: Fact or Fiction
programme.desc: Following the death of his father, a farmer believes he saw a UFO. A geologist discovered debris at the Roswell crash site. After sighting an orb in the sky, a mother develops radiation-like burns on her skin.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.sub-title: The Lost Tomb of Attila the Hun
programme.desc: Josh encounters three separate archaeological teams looking for the lost tomb of Attila the Hun in Hungary. Using legends and ancient texts as a guide, Josh's search takes him from the bottom of the Danube to the mountain forests outside of Budapest.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Parker bets on a risky clain and loses a key team member. Tony storms a new cut with a fleet of new mega machines. Rick's skeleton crew pulls off a miracle. Fred heads to Klondike seeking an alliance.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Conspiracies swirl around an abandoned military base in Long Island, where it's alleged that covert government experiments took place underground. Experts discuss the critical role that the base played in defending America's coastline by both air and sea.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: This Seoul amusement park is full of rusted-out rides and unfinished renovations. Forced to close due to financial problems, the park has found a second life after being used as the setting of K-pop album covers and music videos.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: In the Turkish capital, ambitious plans for a new amusement park are brought to an end by financial, mechanical and political problems. Now its old roller coasters stand as symbols of excess on the city skyline.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: A whole city in Azerbaijan raised to the ground in a conflict decided by a new weapon of war; a Kansas City Workhouse that appears to have been built for the aristocracy; two seemingly deserted towns in Sicily that are hard to decipher.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Developers dream up a lavish neighborhood of matching castles, thermal baths, and panoramic views of the beautiful Turkish landscape. But faced with a bad economy and other financial woes, the project stalled and the castles now stand frozen in time.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Looking into what was once a high-tech facility in a California desert that was used to interrogate POWs.

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: New officers entering the ranks are put through their paces, and one rookie proves her worth. A couple from Mexico arrives with candy unfit for children's consumption. A van full of household furniture attempts to cross, but it hides an illicit surprise.

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: A woman smuggles money into Mexico after shopping while a man hides prescription drugs in a van. A family tries to bring in illicit fruits.

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: A drunk driver causes a three-car crash. A man attempts to import counterfeit goods. An investigation is launched into a pill-smuggling ring, and a shipment of cocaine is found inside office furniture. An armed robber on the run is captured.

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: Methamphetamine is found hidden within a semi-truck full of frozen broccoli, a man is caught smuggling pills inside containers of protein powder, a traveler tries to bring a deer trophy across the border, and an intoxicated US citizen is detained.

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: Officers uncover methamphetamine hidden inside the speakers of a truck and seize drugs stashed deep within lead boxes. A woman denies trafficking in pain relievers, and a male is later interviewed to confirm his citizenship.

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: Upon detaining a woman smuggling Xanax and Tramadol pills, officers learn that she is part of a wider drug operation.

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: Everything natural wants to kill humans. But just when we think we've won, nature fights back -- from angry bison and gale-force winds to giant spiders and bear attacks.

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: The average person will spend nearly 90,000 hours of their life at work. From contractor showdowns and unexpected explosions to battling coworkers, a workday can feel like an epic rollercoaster ride.

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: Rebellious convicts make last-ditch efforts to break free when their hands are tied. Whether a crook on trial takes flight or an inmate gets cozy with a corrections officer, handcuffs, cops, and prison walls are no match for these escape artists.

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: When crooks and criminals run for freedom, the police aren't far behind. Lawbreakers will utilize every tool at their disposal to make their escape -- and officers must do the same in this dangerous battle of wits, speed and weaponry.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A 700-lb. man who has a family history of obesity vows to change his lifestyle to be eligible for a gastric-bypass procedure, and is determined not to die the way his father and sister did. If all goes well, he even hopes to date again.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A woman fears for her kids and that they'll grow up motherless when her weight tops 700 pounds, but she hopes a doctor's diet plan will help her survive a family of addicts.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A 700-lb. man who has a family history of obesity vows to change his lifestyle to be eligible for a gastric-bypass procedure, and is determined not to die the way his father and sister did. If all goes well, he even hopes to date again.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A woman fears for her kids and that they'll grow up motherless when her weight tops 700 pounds, but she hopes a doctor's diet plan will help her survive a family of addicts.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: A woman who used to be active and thin now weighs 620 pounds, but she hopes to get rid of her food addiction by moving in with her niece for some strict supervision.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis
programme.sub-title: The Woman with the Giant Lump
programme.desc: A bodybuilder seeks treatment for a painful lump in her jaw; a patient suffers from infrequent bowel movements shortly after solid food is introduced into his diet.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis
programme.sub-title: The Baby Who Wouldn't Stop Crying
programme.desc: A baby is examined after the whites of her eyes turn blue and her forehead bulges; a teen swimmer seeks help concerning deep pains in her hands.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Couldn't Wake Up
programme.desc: A teen experiences a string of fainting spells after surviving a terrifying car crash; an 11-year-old suffers a terrible headache.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis
programme.desc: A child with Down syndrome is examined; a newlywed suffers from crippling nausea.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis
programme.sub-title: The Woman Whose Flesh Was Eaten Alive
programme.desc: A woman fights for her life following a mammogram and a mastectomy; a baby vomits every time she eats, and weeks later she suffers uncontrollable seizures.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis
programme.desc: After a family moves into a new home, their 11-year-old child starts acting strangely and hops instead of walking. Also: a woman awakens with painful red eyelids weeks before she goes into anaphylactic shock.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis
programme.sub-title: The Sickest Patient in the Hospital
programme.desc: A father of 6-year-old triplets experiences a series of troubling but seemingly unrelated symptoms after minor surgery, including pain and swelling in his legs, followed by nausea and insomnia, and a bright red rash on his neck.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive

programme.desc: Captains Bobby Flay, Anne Burrell and Sunny Anderson challenge each other to create some next-level tailgate 'cue. Then, the contenders grill up some mind-bending BBQ mashups.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl
programme.desc: In BBQ Brawl's most primitive challenge yet, captains Bobby Flay, Anne Burrell and Sunny Anderson challenge the contenders to serve suckling pig the old school way -- cooked over a live fire! Using ancient BBQ techniques, each team must attempt to cook up porky perfection.

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: Latin American Chef Adriana Urbina brings her Michelin background to take down Bobby Flay's Titans. After a surprise announcement, Adriana's strategy to use ingredients the final Titan has never worked must pay off to impress judge Michelle Bernstein.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson and Maneet Chauhan pull out all the stops to help chefs Bernard Bennett and Lena Le roll out a victory over Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: With guests, Brooke Williamson and Matt Walsh.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Fashion icon Tim Gunn and Carla Hall send chefs Rocco Carulli and Craig Richards down the runway to dress Bobby Flay down.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: The Kitchen's Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro aim to take down Bobby Flay, and chefs Kathy Fang and Natascha Hess get into a pickle with the star ingredient.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Bobby Flay brings out special guest, activist Beth Stern, along with Food Network's Katie Lee, for an all-vegetarian battle. Vegetarian chefs Cara Nance and Destiny Aponte are down for the challenge because they're all about that veg -- no trouble!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Chefs and business partners Scott Calhoun and David Feola must challenge each other before they take Bobby Flay down. Meanwhile, Anne Burrell and Michael Symon give Bobby the business.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Katie Lee and Valerie Bertinelli team up to see Bobby Flay fall, and it's up to them to make the call when chef Chris Henry from Massachusetts battles New York's chef Steve Gedra for a chance at the champ.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Things get lyrical in the kitchen when Food Network's Damaris Phillips gets TV host Jaymee Sire to join her sing-along that doesn't end, much to Bobby Flay's annoyance.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Actress Nicole Ari Parker teams up with The Kitchen's Sunny Anderson to take down Bobby Flay. Then, husband-and-wife chefs Julio Lazzarini and Jennifer Behm-Lazzarini must battle one another for a shot at Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Molly Yeh leaves the farm to join Alex Guarnaschelli in the Beat Bobby Flay Fore and Jon Keeley to bring their game faces and dole out a loss to Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Katie Lee Biegel and David Burtka dial up the distractions. Chefs Lambert Givens and Jesse Houston try to ring Bobby Flay's bell.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Iron Chef Michael Symon and Chopped's Amanda Frietag are ready to make sure Bobby Flay goes home empty-handed. Chef Carrie Eagle from Jacksonville, Fla., soars into the arena to take on Cincinnati stalwart Jose Salazar, and both chefs are looking to squeeze out a win against Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Noah Cappe teams up with Anne Burrell to choose between Mark Peel and Nick Williams.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Jet Tila and Jesse Palmer lead a midsummer jam with chefs Demetrius Brown and Pablo Lamon, but Bobby Flay is leaving.

programme.desc: Hazel Miller is a top publicist in New York City looking to build her empire. Diego Vasquez is a top MLB pitcher for the New York Mets who froze during Game 7 of the World Series. He also happens to be the guy who shattered Hazel's heart in high school. When Hazel is tasked with spinning Diego's image, it might be her biggest challenge professionally, and personally, as she takes him back to their hometown in Ohio to deal with what they've both left behind.

programme.desc: A carefree nanny is hired by a workaholic single father, and she begins to bond with the kids and their dad, making her reconsider her commitment-free approach to life.

programme.title: Love by Chance
programme.desc: A busy pastry chef leaves love up to fate and falls for a charming doctor, but then she learns their meeting was arranged by her matchmaking mother and, feeling betrayed, she ends the burgeoning romance.

programme.title: The Story of Us
programme.desc: Jamie learns that her first love Sawyer is the architect for a proposed development that wants to change her beloved neighborhood.

programme.title: Falling for Vermont
programme.desc: Bestselling author Angela Young needs to get away from the media circus surrounding her book, but her boyfriend/manager Brad is too busy making deals to listen. Determined to take a break, Angela pulls a disappearing act and drives off to see the fall foliage.

programme.title: Shifting Gears
programme.desc: After female mechanic Jess reluctantly agrees to participate in a car restoration show, she is shocked to learn that her ex-boyfriend, Luke, is her main competitor.

programme.title: A Picture of Her
programme.desc: Beth becomes the subject of a magazine's cover and goes on a quest to uncover the true identity of the mystery photographer who snapped her photo.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programme.desc: Jon and Kristina are asked to help a client restore her 1700s home, but the narrow staircase is a major obstacle. In addition, Jon is looking for a new property with a purpose, which could be an inn or an abandoned campground.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programme.sub-title: Camp Revamp: Take It to the Limit
programme.desc: The offer was accepted, and now the clock is ticking as the difficulties mount. Jonathan Knight is transforming an abandoned campsite into a holiday destination, and his first project is to transform a dilapidated cabin into the ideal location for a glamping retreat.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: He'll Fight Anything but a Bug in Pattaya, Thailand
programme.desc: After falling in love with Thailand's rich combat sports culture, a Brazilian jiu-jitsu aficionado plans to relocate to Pattaya to train, teach, and relax. He has a healthy phobia of bugs, so he'll have to work hard to find a good apartment within his budget.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Riding the Winds of Change in Wellington
programme.desc: After living in a modest condo in Canada, a family relocates to Wellington, New Zealand, to pursue their dream profession. They desire a detached house with a yard close to schools and jobs, but navigating the wind, terrain, and a competitive market may be difficult.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Downsizing Their Home, But Expanding Their Wish List in Costa Rica
programme.desc: An impulsive Canadian couple is moving with their 16-year-old daughter to the calmer vibes of Costa Rica. They're searching for a place just big enough to house them and their visiting family, but finding everything they're looking for may be a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Queens Newlyweds Take on the King's London

programme.title: Can't Turn Us Around: Alabama's Foot Soldiers
programme.desc: From roughly 1955 to 1965, an organized movement fueled by Black Americans grew across the American south. The goal: an end to segregation and a guarantee of equal civil rights. And nowhere did the movement for Black equality fight its most crucial battles than in one of the most segregated states in the union: Alabama.

programme.title: After Jackie
programme.desc: Honoring the brave men who fought to integrate baseball and demanded a more inclusive and fairer America for African American athletes.

programme.title: Grant
programme.desc: In an unlikely American history story, Ulysses S. Grant rises from his humble beginnings to become the winning General in one of the Civil War's bloodiest battles.

programme.title: Grant
programme.desc: With his back up against the wall, Ulysses S. Grant takes incredible risks, becomes Abraham Lincoln's favorite General, and prepares for an epic clash with Robert E. Lee.

programme.title: Grant
programme.desc: Ulysses S. Grant defeats Robert E. Lee and wins the Civil War, only to find that he will be called to duty again to serve as President during one of the most difficult times in American history.

programme.title: Black Patriots: Heroes of the Revolution
programme.desc: A comprehensive picture of the African American experience during the Revolutionary War. Featuring the story of the war within the revolution through the eyes of some of the most crucial and significant African American figures of the country's foundation, including Crispus Attucks, Peter Salem, Phillis Wheatley and James Armistead Lafayette. Spotlighting NBA legend, best-selling author and esteemed activist Kareem Abdul-Jabbar.

programme.title: Black Patriots: Heroes of the Civil War
programme.desc: This one-hour documentary takes viewers through an evolution of African American involvement over the course of the Civil War through the stories of some of the most crucial and significant figures of the day including Harriet Tubman, Robert Smalls, Frederick Douglass, the 1st Kansas Colored Volunteer Infantry Regiment, and the most celebrated regiment of black soldiers during the Civil War, the famed 54th Massachusetts Infantry Regiment.

programme.title: Black Patriots: Buffalo Soldiers
programme.desc: The incredible story of the Nations' first all-Black peacetime regiments who fought to expand America's presence in the West, protect the National Parks, and defend the U.S. on foreign soil. Narrated by Blair Underwood, this special brings to light the remarkable story of this unknown army of African American soldiers whose stories have been ignored by history.

programme.title: Harlem Hellfighters
programme.desc: Exploring the leadership, sacrifice and valor of the 15th National Guard, which would become a part of the 369th Infantry and one of WWI's best military regiments.

programme.title: Triumph: Jesse Owens and the Berlin Olympics
programme.desc: This documentary explores the dramatic tale of Owens' athletic dedication, perseverance and triumph over Hitler's Aryan supremacy agenda.

programme.title: 761st Tank Battalion: The Original Black Panthers
programme.desc: The powerful story of the first all-Black tank unit to serve in combat in U.S. military history. Under General George Patten's command, the 761st battalion fought heroically throughout WWII and were the furthest east of all U.S. troops in the European theater of war when hostilities ceased in 1945. Their valor went unrecognized for decades until veterans of the battalion and their allies saw to it that they received the honor and recognition they deserved.
